name: okapi-monorepo
description: Okapi - an OKF Knowledge Studio: see, understand, audit, author and query OKF bundles.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter okapi-okf build
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter okapi-okf dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
